Same Team. New Name.

Formerly Tom's Diesel & Custom Truck

While our name has changed, our commitment hasn't. Gear Haven is built on the same reputation for quality diesel repair and trusted relationships customers have relied on for years – now expanded to serve cars, trucks, SUVs, fleets, and diesel pickups across Southwest Missouri.

Read Our Story
Complete Auto & Diesel Care

One shop. Everything your vehicle needs.

From the family SUV to the work truck to the whole fleet – we keep it all safe, reliable, and running right.

Cars

Preventative maintenance, diagnostics, repairs, tires, alignments, inspections, and more.

Trucks

Gas and diesel truck repair, performance upgrades, accessories, suspension, wheels, and tires.

Fleets

Maintenance and repair programs designed to minimize downtime and keep your business moving.

Why Drivers Choose Us

Grandma knows
you're safe here.

Eight years of neighbors trusting us with the family car, the work truck, and everything in between. Here's what that trust is built on.

8
years keeping the
Ozarks safely on the road

Honest Recommendations

We fix what's needed, explain why, and help you make informed decisions. If something can wait, we'll tell you that too, no upsells, no scare tactics.

Digital Vehicle Inspections

Every inspection includes detailed photos and plain-language explanations sent to your phone, so you can see exactly what our technicians see.

Fast Communication

Your vehicle won't sit for weeks while you wonder what's happening. We keep you informed at every step, from diagnosis to the moment it's ready.

Quality Work You Can Trust

We're not interested in being the cheapest shop in town. We're focused on repairs done right the first time, and we stand behind every one of them.

Schedule Your Visit Honest, safe, and treated like family.

Protect Your Investment

More than a repair – a relationship.

Your vehicle is one of the biggest investments you make. At Gear Haven, we don't just repair vehicles – we help you maintain them, understand them, and get the most life possible out of them.

We're proud to call Nixa home. Our team lives, works, and raises families right here in the Ozarks. We're not a national chain – we're neighbors, looking out for neighbors, whether you're bringing in the family car, your work truck, or the whole fleet.

before profits
